title: Magical Medicinal Malaysian Noodles
description: A cultured and juicy Malaysian dish featuring applesauce and bonito-shave, designed to cure hangovers, with a Mediterranean-friendly twist.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a blender or food processor, combine applesauce, bonito flakes, olive oil, garlic, and ginger, and blend until smooth.
In a large skillet, heat the blended sauce over medium heat and stir in soy sauce.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Stir in scallions, sesame seeds, and salt.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional scallions and sesame seeds if desired.
Let the dish cool for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
